D:\aplikacje\cmake-4.2.0-rc1-windows-x86_64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\app.dir/objects.a
D:\narzedzia\MSYS2\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\app.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\app.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\narzedzia\MSYS2\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -Wl,-Bstatic,--whole-archive -Wl,--no-whole-archive -Wl,-Bdynamic -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\app.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o C:\Users\lukas\Desktop\ox-engine\app.exe -Wl,--out-implib,C:\Users\lukas\Desktop\ox-engine\libapp.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\app.dir\linkLibs.rsp
